task: Lift the toy potato sitting in the silver pot on the upper left side of the stove. Pick it up and move the right side and down. Place it on the orange square at the lower right side of the stove.
raw:
**SCENE ANALYSIS** - A silver pot sits on the left burner of a stovetop. Inside the pot is a light brown, round object (toy potato). To the right of the stovetop is a white sink with an orange sponge. The stovetop has a red indicator light on the left burner. STRATEGY - First, reach into the pot to grasp the toy potato. Lift it, then transport it to the right side of the stovetop and lower it onto the orange sponge. Failure modes include dropping the potato during transport or placing it on the sink's edge instead of the sponge. AFFORDANCE REASONING - Step 1: Reach into the pot to grasp the potato (affordance: the body of the toy potato). Step 2: Grasp the potato (affordance: the body of the toy potato). Step 3: Transport the potato to the right side of the stovetop (affordance: the area on the stovetop near the sink). Step 4: Place the potato on the orange sponge (affordance: the body of the orange sponge).

**Goal:** on(orange_sponge, toy_potato); stable(toy_potato)
**Scene:** silver_pot, toy_potato, stovetop, orange_sponge, sink
**Step 1:** reach(silver_pot)
  affordance_region: the body of the silver pot
  contact: gripper_state(open) [progress]
  spatial: distance(gripper, silver_pot, <, 0.03) [completion]
  direction: approach_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: distance(gripper, silver_pot) < 0.03
**Step 2:** grasp(toy_potato)
  affordance_region: the body of the toy potato
  contact: holding(toy_potato) [completion]
  direction: grasp_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: holding(toy_potato)
**Step 3:** transport(toy_potato -> stovetop_right)
  affordance_region: the area on the stovetop near the sink
  spatial: above(toy_potato, stovetop_right, 0.05) [completion]
  safety: no_drop(toy_potato)
  done_when: above(toy_potato, stovetop_right, 0.05)
**Step 4:** place(toy_potato -> orange_sponge)
  affordance_region: the body of the orange sponge
  contact: surface_contact(toy_potato, orange_sponge) [completion]; released(toy_potato) [completion]
  pose: stable(toy_potato) [completion]
  done_when: surface_contact(toy_potato, orange_sponge) AND released(toy_potato)
<END_OF_PLAN>

steps.affordance_region: the body of the silver pot
the body of the toy potato
the area on the stovetop near the sink
the body of the orange sponge
